texto: You should feel good about yourself. Don't get down in a pit all about yourself, and how much you suck. 'Cause that rubbish ain't true. There's a reason you're the way you are, and who knows, anything can happen to anybody, so, never go down in the pit, and, if you do, you better get yourself poor self out of there, RIGHT AWAY.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sydney Wilhelmy sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You should feel good about yourself. Don't get down in a pit all about yourself, and how much you…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, good-attitude, inspirational-life, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspirational-life.
